## Inspector ID

`frontmatter_shape`

## Purpose

Group files by their frontmatter key-set and report observed field types.

## Usage

Inspectors take no configuration; they emit evidence — counts and distributions — for the reader to judge. Run this one over a corpus:

```
katalyst inspect <path> --inspector frontmatter_shape
```
